hypothesis: If evaluation of generative crystal models integrates DFT relaxation and convex-hull stability (RMSD and SUN) with ML property/latent metrics, then scores will degrade monotonically with increasing controlled distortions and consistently rank diffusion models by their fraction of stable (≤0.1 eV/atom above hull), unique, and novel structures because the physics-based components anchor the metrics to true thermodynamic and structural validity.
